$comment: Sanitized artifact provenance fixture for Task 3.5 tests. Contains fingerprints and metadata only. EXPLICITLY EXCLUDED: raw artifact contents, raw prompts, tokens, credentials, private filesystem paths.
description: Representative artifact provenance scenarios for automated coverage of identity, revision, approval, integrity, and step-attempt recording.

scenarios.description: Artifact produced once; no approval yet.
Artifact produced once and approved by a different agent.
Artifact revised after approval; new revision resets approvalState to pending, invalidating prior approval.
scenarios.$comment: Stable ArtifactId 'art-ccc333' is shared across both revisions. Revision 2 resets approvalState to 'pending', blocking dispatch of normative inputs until re-approved.

scenarios.description: Step retried twice; second attempt pins to same consumed revision as first.

stepAttempts.$comment: Retry pins to revision 1 from attempt 1, even if a newer revision exists.

scenarios.description: Dispatch blocked because supplied digest does not match stored digest (tamper detection, fail-closed).
scenarios.$comment: suppliedDigest does not match stored digest. Engine returns policy_decision error (fail-closed). No step attempt is recorded.

scenarios.description: Approval rejected because approverAgent matches producerAgent.

approvalAttempt.$comment: Self-approval is prohibited. Engine returns policy_decision error.

scenarios.description: Two steps with independent attempt counters on the same workflow instance.

provenanceInvariants.stableIdentity: ArtifactId is assigned once at first production and never changes across revisions of the same artifact name.
provenanceInvariants.monotonicRevision: Revision counter starts at 1 and increments by 1 for each new version of the same artifact name.
provenanceInvariants.approvalInvalidation: A new revision always resets approvalState to 'pending', invalidating any prior approval on the same artifact name.
provenanceInvariants.selfApprovalProhibition: An agent may not approve an artifact it produced (producerAgent === approverAgent is rejected).
provenanceInvariants.integrityFailClosed: When a supplied digest does not match the stored digest, dispatch is blocked (policy_decision error). No step attempt is recorded.
provenanceInvariants.integrityOptIn: Integrity verification is opt-in: if no digest is supplied for an artifact with stored integrity, the check is skipped.
provenanceInvariants.retryPinning: Retries pin to the same consumed artifact revisions from the prior attempt by default, preventing silent drift.
provenanceInvariants.noRawContent: Raw artifact contents, prompts, completions, tokens, credentials, and private paths are never stored in provenance records.
